zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前以太坊/美元(ETH/USD)价格在2114.96附近震荡，24小时涨幅仅0.41%，显示多空力量暂时均衡。价格略低于20日均线SMA(20) 2119.87，短期趋势偏弱，但未出现明显跌破关键支撑的信号，多头仍有回补空间。  

MACD显示指标为-4.337，处于负值区域，表明市场空头力量占优，但信号线未提供明确交叉提示，短期可能维持横盘或轻微回落。由于RSI数据缺失，超买超卖状态无法准确判断，但结合近期低波动，可初步认为市场尚未过度恐慌。  

支撑位方面，短线关键支撑在2104.4附近，若跌破则可能引发进一步回调；阻力位在2118.3高点及SMA(20)附近，突破后可能触发新一轮上攻。交易策略上，短线可考虑区间操作，低位适量做多，高位或均线附近谨慎减仓，同时保持止损纪律。  

总体来看，以太坊当前呈现弱势震荡整理格局，短期内多空博弈激烈。建议关注SMA(20)和2104支撑的突破情况，结合MACD背离与量能变化，灵活调整仓位，避免追高杀低。市场若出现突破信号，可顺势跟进趋势操作。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 2114.96, holding within a narrow intraday range between 2104.40 and 2118.34. Price action remains slightly bearish in the short term as ETH continues to trade below the 20-period SMA at 2119.87, indicating fading momentum after recent consolidation. The modest 24-hour gain of 0.41% suggests buyers are attempting to stabilize the market, though upside conviction remains limited without a stronger breakout above nearby resistance levels.

The MACD reading at -4.337 indicates lingering bearish momentum, even though downside pressure appears to be slowing. With the signal line unavailable, confirmation of a bullish crossover cannot yet be established, but the negative MACD value still reflects weak trend strength. RSI data is absent, making momentum assessment less complete, although current price compression near the moving average points toward a neutral-to-cautious market structure rather than aggressive selling conditions.

Immediate support is positioned around 2104, which aligns with the session low and an area where buyers recently stepped in. A decisive break beneath this zone could expose ETH to additional downside toward the psychological 2090 region. On the upside, resistance is forming near 2120, closely aligned with the SMA(20). A sustained move above 2120–2125 would improve short-term sentiment and potentially open the path toward 2145 and higher recovery targets.

Short-term traders may prefer a cautious range-trading approach until volatility expands and clearer directional confirmation emerges. Long positions become more attractive only after a confirmed break above resistance with improving momentum indicators, while bearish setups gain credibility if support at 2104 fails. Risk management remains essential in the current environment, as Ethereum appears caught between weakening bearish pressure and still-unconfirmed bullish recovery signals.
